metadata.title: GRC Engineering Capstone: compliant storage primitives

components.title: compliant-gcs-bucket Terraform module
components.description: Terraform module provisioning GCS buckets with NIST 800-53 rev 5 controls hardcoded: CMEK with 90-day rotation, uniform bucket-level access, enforced public access prevention, versioning, retention, and required configuration labels. Implementation: terraform/primitives/compliant-gcs. Merge gate: policy/gcs/storage.rego. Runtime detection: monitoring/drift_detector.py. Evidence: evidence-automation/collect_evidence.py output in evidence/live/.

control-implementations.description: NIST SP 800-53 rev 5 controls implemented by the compliant-gcs-bucket module and verified by policy, tests, detection, and collected evidence.

implemented-requirements.description: Cryptographic key establishment and management: customer-managed KMS keyring and crypto key with a 90-day rotation period, created and owned by the module (terraform/primitives/compliant-gcs/main.tf, google_kms_crypto_key.key). Verified by terraform test run dev_baseline_enforces_controls and by the SC-12 evidence record.
Cryptographic protection: bucket default encryption bound to the module's CMEK (main.tf encryption block). Gated at merge by policy/gcs/storage.rego rule [SC-12/SC-13/SC-28].
Protection of information at rest: CMEK encryption enforced by the module and re-checked at runtime by monitoring/drift_detector.py (SC-12/SC-13/SC-28 finding class).

Access enforcement: uniform bucket-level access and public_access_prevention=enforced hardcoded in the module; denied at merge if absent (policy/gcs/storage.rego [AC-3] rules); public-access drift detected at runtime with two AC-3 findings (see monitoring/tests).

Audit record retention: object versioning plus a retention policy derived from retention_days, with a plan-time validation and an independent policy-gate rule requiring >= 365 days when environment is prod.

Configuration settings: four required labels merged over consumer labels so they cannot be suppressed (verified by terraform test run consumer_cannot_suppress_required_labels); label absence is denied at merge and detected at runtime.
